name: Olive Garden Alfredo Fettucine
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Cream cheese, cut into bits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the cream cheese, Parmesan, butter, and milk. Stir constantly until smooth.
2. Toss the pasta lightly with the sauce, coating it well.
3. Leftovers freeze well.
Source: Gloria Pitzer's Secret Recipes
